name: twilio-developer-toolkit
description: Twilio Skills provide procedural knowledge for AI coding agents — which APIs to use, in what order, and what to avoid. Covers SMS, Voice, WhatsApp, Verify, SendGrid, Compliance, and 30+ products.

interface.shortDescription: Twilio Skills for building, debugging, and shipping on Twilio
interface.longDescription: Procedural knowledge that guides AI coding agents to the right Twilio APIs for any use case. Covers channel selection, production best practices, compliance requirements, and common pitfalls across SMS, Voice, WhatsApp, Verify, SendGrid, and 30+ products. Skills follow a progressive disclosure architecture — your agent sees lightweight metadata at startup and loads full guidance only when a task matches.
defaultPrompt: Help me send an SMS notification with delivery tracking
What Twilio API should I use to verify a user's phone number?
How do I register for A2P 10DLC before sending US SMS?
Build me an AI voice agent with Twilio Conversation Relay
